assistantText:
The GITHUB_TOKEN (PAT) belongs to **locky-bot2** — that's who pushed it.

The script in `create-and-push.sh` tests the token against `https://api.github.com/user` to resolve the username, then embeds it as `locky-bot2:${TOKEN}@github.com/locky-bot2/weather-app-hermes.git` in the remote URL. The push was authenticated as `locky-bot2`.
